summary: Plan-only inventory shard classified five open PRs independently. No merge recommendation is safe because the artifact lacks complete merge preflight proof, especially Codex /review evidence. PR #86730 has a failing proof check, but the provided artifacts do not include failure logs or a complete executable repair plan, so it is kept as an independent PR rather than emitted as a placeholder fix action.
